title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Mahindra & Mahindra

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Mahindra & Mahindra
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Mahindra & Mahindra in Chennai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Mahindra & Mahindra:
Mahindra & Mahindra is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra & Mahindra!
